name: Semantic Compression Stack
postCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install flask flask-cors && python3 -c "from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer; SentenceTransformer('all-MiniLM-L6-v2'); from llmlingua import PromptCompressor; PromptCompressor('microsoft/llmlingua-2-bert-base-multilingual-cased-meetingbank', use_llmlingua2=True, device_map='cpu')" && echo 'All models cached'
